CREATE_PROFILE.Q: How do I create a candidate profile?
CREATE_PROFILE.A: Click "Get Started" and register with your email. Once verified, navigate to your profile page to fill in your experience, skills, and education details.

MULTIPLE_APPLICATIONS.Q: Can I apply to multiple jobs at once?
MULTIPLE_APPLICATIONS.A: Yes. Browse jobs and click "Apply" on each listing. You can track all your applications from the Applications section in your dashboard.

UPLOAD_RESUME.Q: How do I upload my resume?
UPLOAD_RESUME.A: Go to your Profile page and scroll to the Resume section. Click "Upload Resume" and select a PDF file up to 5MB.

PROFILE_VISIBILITY.Q: Will employers see my profile before I apply?
PROFILE_VISIBILITY.A: Only if your profile visibility is set to Public. You can toggle this in Settings under Privacy.

POST_JOB.Q: How do I post a job listing?
POST_JOB.A: Log in as an employer, navigate to "Post Job" from your dashboard, fill in the job details, and submit. Your listing will go live after a quick review.

FREE_JOBS.Q: How many jobs can I post for free?
FREE_JOBS.A: The free plan allows up to 3 active job listings. Upgrade to a paid plan to post unlimited listings and access premium features.

EDIT_JOB.Q: Can I edit a job post after publishing?
EDIT_JOB.A: Yes. Go to Manage Jobs in your dashboard, find the listing, and click Edit. Changes are reflected immediately.

FREE_TO_USE.A: JobPortal is free for candidates. Employers can post up to 3 jobs for free. Premium plans are available for advanced hiring features.

RESET_PASSWORD.Q: How do I reset my password?
RESET_PASSWORD.A: Click "Sign in" then "Forgot password". Enter your registered email and we will send you a reset link within 5 minutes.

AVAILABILITY.Q: Which countries is JobPortal available in?
AVAILABILITY.A: JobPortal is available worldwide. Remote jobs are accessible globally, while on-site listings are filtered by location.

PAYMENT_METHODS.A: We accept all major credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) and UPI payments.

CANCEL_SUBSCRIPTION.Q: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
CANCEL_SUBSCRIPTION.A: Yes. You can cancel anytime from your billing settings. Your plan remains active until the end of the current billing cycle.
